commentary.text: Marshall marks and misses from 45m in the corridor.
Taranto snaps a nice goal from a pack in the pocket 30m out off his right.
Grlj roves and shoots from 50m on a slight angle, also just to the right.
Fawcett marks in front of Wilkie 45m out on the flank but leaves his set shot just narrow to the right.
Sharman marks behind Gray 15m out on a slight angle for his second goal.
Balta goes early under the flight of a long ball to a pack 25m out on the flank to allow Marshall to mark and miss.
Marshall passes from the centre to O'Connell 45m out on the flank on a switch play, the Irishman shanks for no score.
Campbell gathers a centre clearance scrubber by Taranto and feeds Roberts-Thomson for his second!
After a Sonsie fumble on the HBF for Richmond, De Koning marks a Windhager centring ball 35m out in a slight angle and pops through the goal.
Roberts-Thomson is a touch lucky to get a red hot HTB free on Flanders at the hotspot, he kicks his first senior goal in his debut game.
#####St Kilda loses Mitch Owens but regains Jack Higgins, while the Tigers copped another two injuries last week to take their injury list to a full 18.
